hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$FILE" != *.cs ]] && exit 0; SLNX=$(ls /Users/goktugibolar/dev/document-intelligence/*.slnx 2>/dev/null | head -1); OUTPUT=$(dotnet build "$SLNX" --no-restore /p:RunAnalyzers=false -q 2>&1); ERRORS=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep " error CS"); if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "$ERRORS"; exit 2; fi

echo '{"systemMessage": "Context compaction triggered. Before compacting: update CLAUDE.md in the project root — tick off completed items in the Faz checklists and note any architecture/implementation decisions made this session so they survive compaction."}'
